case_title: BEVERLY HANLY VS. JOSHUA LONETREE HEDLUND et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANLY, BEVERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEDLUND, JOSHUA LONETREE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2787 BRYANT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO., **JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANLY, BEVERLY AS TO DEFENDANT HEDLUND, JOSHUA LONETREE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANLY, BEVERLY SERVED APR-12-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF ARTHUR MEIRSON RE: NO ORIGINAL LEASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANLY, BEVERLY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HEDLUND, JOSHUA LONETREE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANLY, BEVERLY SERVED APR-11-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEDLUND, JOSHUA LONETREE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HEDLUND, JOSHUA LONETREE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANLY, BEVERLY AS TO DEFENDANT HEDLUND, JOSHUA LONETREE DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HEDLUND, JOSHUA LONETREE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $65.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANLY, BEVERLY
